turns.question: Here's your order, have a great day!
turns.answer: Thank you so much, you too!

turns.question: Is there anything else I can get for you?
Enjoy your drink, thanks for coming in!
turns.answer: Thanks, I will, see you next time!

turns.question: Take care out there, thanks again for coming!
turns.answer: Thank you, you too, bye now!

turns.question: Here you go, careful, it's pretty hot!
turns.answer: Thanks for the heads up, I appreciate it.

turns.question: Thanks for your patience today, enjoy!
turns.answer: No problem at all, thank you!

turns.question: Have a wonderful rest of your day!
Hope to see you again soon, take care!
Here's your bag, everything should be inside.
Thanks for coming in, stay warm out there!
Safe travels, and thanks for stopping in!
turns.answer: Thank you so much, take care!

turns.question: Enjoy your coffee, and good luck at work today!
turns.answer: Thank you so much, appreciate it!

turns.question: Here's your change, have a wonderful evening!
Thanks for visiting us today, come back anytime!
turns.answer: I will, thanks so much, bye!

turns.question: Have a safe drive home, thanks for coming!
turns.answer: Thank you, I will, take care!

turns.question: Enjoy, and I hope your presentation goes great!
Thanks for coming in, hope to see you again!
turns.answer: For sure, thanks so much, take care!
